stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A modern airborne weather radar produces a hook-shaped return as illustrated in the left portion of the annex. This is an indication of..

options.a: the core of a jet stream with turbulence on the cold-air side of the core.
options.b: a warm or quasi-stationary front with a significant shift in the direction of the wind and light showers.
options.c: severe turbulence and may indicate the location of an embedded tornado vortex.
options.d: an anvil at the top of a thunderstorm but without any significant turbulence.
